sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_GRC

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_54604ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cc5
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_GRC</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_GRC</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_GRC = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_GRC.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"GRC","check_name":"Now Assist GRC Plugin Status","order":"10","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("sn_irm_gen_ai", "sn_irm_gen_ai");
    if (result.found) {
        return {
            status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for GRC (" + "sn_irm_gen_ai" + ") installed | version: " + result.version + " | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "Now Assist for GRC is installed. AI-assisted policy authoring and risk summarization are available."
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: "not_ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for GRC (sn_irm_gen_ai) not found in sys_store_app or sys_plugins",
            finding: "Now Assist for GRC (sn_irm_gen_ai) not found. AI-assisted policy authoring and risk summarization are unavailable."
        };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist for GRC requires a dedicated plugin enabling AI-assisted policy authoring, control testing, and risk summarization.","remediation_guidance":"Activate the Now Assist for GRC plugin (sn_irm_gen_ai) via sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm GRC Now Assist entitlement with your ServiceNow account team.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"Policy and Control Population","order":"20","check_script":"(function() {
    var policyTable = new GlideRecord("sn_compliance_policy");
    if (!policyTable.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sn_compliance_policy not found", finding: "Compliance Policy table (sn_compliance_policy) is not available. Verify the Policy and Compliance plugin is active." };
    }
    var gaPolicy = new GlideAggregate("sn_compliance_policy");
    gaPolicy.addQuery("active", true);
    gaPolicy.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaPolicy.query();
    var policies = gaPolicy.next() ? parseInt(gaPolicy.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var controls = 0;
    var controlTable = new GlideRecord("sn_compliance_control");
    if (controlTable.isValid()) {
        var gaControl = new GlideAggregate("sn_compliance_control");
        gaControl.addQuery("active", true);
        gaControl.addAggregate("COUNT");
        gaControl.query();
        controls = gaControl.next() ? parseInt(gaControl.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    }
    var actualValue = policies + " active policies | " + controls + " active controls";
    if (policies >= 10 && controls >= 50) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Good GRC data foundation — Now Assist can perform AI-assisted compliance assessment across " + policies + " policies and " + controls + " controls." };
    } else if (policies >= 5 || controls >= 20) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Partial GRC data (" + policies + " policies, " + controls + " controls). Now Assist GRC AI assessment will have limited coverage. Target: 10+ policies, 50+ controls." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Insufficient GRC data (" + policies + " policies, " + controls + " controls). Now Assist GRC AI assessment requires a comprehensive policy and control foundation." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"GRC policies and controls are the data foundation Now Assist GRC uses for AI-assisted compliance assessment and control testing recommendations.","remediation_guidance":"Populate policies aligned to key frameworks (SOC2, ISO27001, NIST). Map controls to policies. Target: 10+ active policies, 50+ active controls.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"Risk Register Population","order":"30","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_risk_risk');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active risk records';

    if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active risks — Now Assist GRC has sufficient risk context for AI-driven scoring and mitigation recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active risks (target: 20+). Now Assist GRC risk recommendations will have limited coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active risks. Now Assist GRC requires a populated risk register for AI-driven risk scoring and mitigation recommendations.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Risk records provide the risk context Now Assist GRC uses for AI-driven risk scoring and mitigation recommendations.","remediation_guidance":"Populate risk register for key business domains. Assign risk owners. Map risks to controls. Target: 20+ active risks.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"Attestation Workflow Configuration","order":"40","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("asmt_assessment_instance");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table asmt_assessment_instance not found", finding: "Assessment Instance table is not available. Verify the Assessments plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("asmt_assessment_instance");
    ga.addQuery("state", "in_progress");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active attestation instances";
    if (count >= 10) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active attestation instances — Now Assist GRC has active workflow history for AI-assisted compliance verification." };
    } else if (count >= 3) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active attestation instances (target: 10+). Now Assist GRC automated evidence collection will have limited workflow coverage." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active attestation instances. Now Assist GRC AI automated evidence collection requires active attestation workflows." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Attestation workflows enable Now Assist GRC AI to automate control evidence collection and compliance verification.","remediation_guidance":"Configure attestation workflows for key control domains. Enable automated attestation scheduling. Ensure tasks are in active state during assessment periods.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"Control Test Results","order":"50","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_compliance_test_result');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'No control test results in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No control test results found in the last 12 months. Now Assist GRC AI audit preparation requires recent test history.'
        };
    }

    var gaPass = new GlideAggregate('sn_compliance_test_result');
    gaPass.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaPass.addQuery('result', 'pass');
    gaPass.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaPass.query();
    var passed = gaPass.next() ? parseInt(gaPass.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((passed / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = total + ' test results (last 12 months) | ' + pct + '% passing';

    if (total >= 50 && pct >= 70) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' control test results with ' + pct + '% pass rate. Now Assist GRC has sufficient test history for AI-powered audit preparation.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 20 || pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' control test results with ' + pct + '% pass rate (targets: 50+ results, 70% pass rate). Now Assist GRC audit preparation will have reduced coverage or accuracy.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Insufficient test coverage or high failure rate (' + total + ' results, ' + pct + '% passing). Now Assist GRC AI audit preparation requires comprehensive recent test history.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Control test results provide the historical compliance evidence Now Assist GRC uses for AI-assisted audit preparation and gap analysis.","remediation_guidance":"Perform control testing and document results. Target: 50+ test results in the trailing 12 months with 70%+ pass rate. Now Assist GRC uses recent test history for AI audit preparation.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"GRC Framework Mapping","order":"60","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_compliance_authority_document');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active authority documents / frameworks';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' regulatory frameworks mapped — Now Assist GRC can provide framework-specific AI compliance guidance.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' framework(s) mapped (target: 3+). Now Assist GRC compliance recommendations will be limited to a narrow regulatory scope.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No regulatory frameworks mapped. Now Assist GRC requires framework context (e.g. SOC2, ISO27001, NIST) for AI compliance recommendations.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Regulatory framework mapping enables Now Assist GRC to provide framework-specific AI compliance recommendations.","remediation_guidance":"Map controls and policies to relevant regulatory frameworks (SOC2, ISO27001, NIST, HIPAA) via sn_compliance_authority_document. Now Assist uses framework context for AI compliance guidance.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"Issue and Exception Tracking","order":"70","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sn_grc_issue");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sn_grc_issue not found", finding: "GRC Issue table (sn_grc_issue) is not available. Verify the GRC plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_grc_issue");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active GRC issues";
    if (count >= 10) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active GRC issues being tracked — Now Assist GRC has remediation context for AI risk prioritization." };
    } else if (count >= 3) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active GRC issues (target: 10+). Now Assist GRC risk prioritization recommendations will have limited issue context." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active GRC issues tracked. Now Assist GRC uses active issue history for AI risk prioritization and remediation recommendations." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"GRC issues and exceptions provide the remediation context Now Assist uses for AI-driven risk prioritization.","remediation_guidance":"Log and actively track control failures as issues. Document exceptions with risk justification. Ensure issues remain active until formally resolved.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"GRC Engagement and Audit Scheduling","order":"80","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_audit_engagement');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active audit engagements';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active audit engagements — Now Assist GRC can provide proactive AI compliance recommendations based on upcoming audit timelines.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active audit engagement(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist GRC proactive recommendations will be limited in scope.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active audit engagements. Now Assist GRC proactive recommendations require an active audit schedule.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Audit engagements provide the audit calendar context Now Assist GRC uses for proactive compliance AI recommendations.","remediation_guidance":"Schedule audits and compliance engagements via sn_audit_engagement. Now Assist GRC provides proactive AI recommendations based on upcoming audit timelines.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"Risk Scoring Configuration","order":"90","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_risk_risk');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No active risk records found',
            finding: 'No active risks in the risk register. Risk scoring cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaScored = new GlideAggregate('sn_risk_risk');
    gaScored.addQuery('active', true);
    gaScored.addQuery('residual_risk_score', '>', 0);
    gaScored.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaScored.query();
    var scored = gaScored.next() ? parseInt(gaScored.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((scored / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active risks have residual scores (' + scored + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of risks have residual risk scores — Now Assist GRC can provide quantified AI risk recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of risks have residual scores (target: 80%). Now Assist GRC quantified risk assessment will have gaps for unscored records.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: (total - scored) + ' risks missing residual risk scores (' + pct + '% scored). Now Assist GRC quantified risk assessment requires scored risk records.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Risk scoring configuration enables Now Assist GRC to provide quantified AI risk assessment recommendations.","remediation_guidance":"Configure risk scoring methodology (likelihood x impact). Ensure all active risks have a residual_risk_score greater than zero. A score of 0 provides no quantified signal for Now Assist GRC.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"GRC Customization Risk","order":"100","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    ga.addQuery('collection', 'IN', 'sn_compliance_control,sn_risk_risk');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' custom Business Rules on GRC tables';

    if (count <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low GRC customization risk (' + count + ' custom BRs). Now Assist GRC AI workflow automation is unlikely to encounter conflicts.'
        };
    } else if (count <= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom BRs on GRC tables. Moderate customization risk — test Now Assist GRC in sub-production before enabling in production.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'High GRC customization risk: ' + count + ' custom BRs on core GRC tables. Now Assist GRC AI workflow automation may conflict with existing customizations.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"Custom business rules on GRC tables can conflict with Now Assist GRC AI workflow automation.","remediation_guidance":"Review custom Business Rules on sn_compliance_control and sn_risk_risk. Test Now Assist GRC with customizations enabled in a sub-production instance. Consider deactivating or consolidating redundant BRs.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"GRC Vendor Risk Data","order":"110","check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sn_vdr_risk_asmt_vdr_tiering_assessment");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sn_vdr_risk_asmt_vdr_tiering_assessment not found", finding: "TPRM Vendor Tiering Assessment table is not available. Verify the Vendor Risk Management plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_vdr_risk_asmt_vdr_tiering_assessment");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " vendor tiering assessments";
    if (count >= 10) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " vendor tiering assessments — Now Assist GRC has sufficient vendor context for AI supply chain risk analysis." };
    } else if (count >= 3) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " vendor tiering assessments (target: 10+). Now Assist GRC supply chain risk recommendations will have limited vendor coverage." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " vendor tiering assessments. Now Assist GRC uses vendor data for AI supply chain risk recommendations — insufficient data for meaningful analysis." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Vendor risk assessments provide the third-party risk context Now Assist GRC uses for AI-driven supply chain risk recommendations.","remediation_guidance":"Populate vendor risk assessments via sn_vendor_risk_vendor_list.do. Assess top vendors by spend and criticality. Target: 10+ active vendor assessments.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"GRC","check_name":"GRC Performance Analytics","order":"120","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Use separate queries per keyword to avoid OR precedence issues
    // then deduplicate by sys_id to avoid double-counting indicators
    // that match multiple keywords
    var matched = {};

    function collectMatches(keyword) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('pa_indicators');
        gr.addQuery('active', true);
        gr.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', keyword);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            matched[gr.getUniqueValue()] = true;
        }
    }

    collectMatches('risk');
    collectMatches('compliance');
    collectMatches('audit');

    var count = Object.keys(matched).length;
    var actualValue = count + ' active GRC PA indicators';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active GRC PA indicators — Now Assist can provide trend-based compliance AI insights.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active GRC PA indicator(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist GRC trend-based insights will be limited — point-in-time analysis only for uncovered metrics.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active GRC PA indicators found. Now Assist GRC uses trend data for predictive compliance insights — without PA data AI can only provide point-in-time analysis.'
        };
    }
})","ai_justification":"GRC Performance Analytics indicators provide trend data Now Assist uses for predictive compliance insights.","remediation_guidance":"Create PA indicators for key GRC metrics (control pass rate, risk exposure, open issues). Schedule data collection jobs. Target: 3+ active indicators covering risk, compliance, and audit domains.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_GRC'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:30</sys_created_on><sys_id>54604ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cc5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_GRC</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_54604ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cc5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
